positive: A stylized, maximalist celestial forest scene, centered composition, featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna against a deep indigo night sky. The main subject is a massive, ancient, glowing Moonpetal Tree with intricate, filigree-like branches that intertwine with constellations. Floating elements include nebula-streaked jellyfish and stylized crescent moons casting soft, ethereal light. Use a limited palette of deep sapphire, vibrant cyan, luminous gold, and emerald green. The art style should mimic highly detailed woodblock prints (Ukiyo-e influence) combined with modern digital illustration, emphasizing clean lines, strong silhouettes, and high contrast. Perfect for a t-shirt print, symmetrical and visually balanced.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifact, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature, logo, text, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, out of frame, poorly drawn hands, low quality, disfigured
